name: dataindex.us
description: The dataindex.us team offers several types of newsletter content so you can choose what interests you most: Blog posts feature commentary and analysis from dataindex.us collaborators and guests on topics covering a range of data-related issues and insights.Take Action! is a (mostly) weekly publication highlighting proposed government changes currently open for public comment. These include changes to surveys, evaluations, SOGI questions, program collections, and federal records.ICR Updates are weekly digests analyzing every change request submitted to OMB during the previous week, with a focus on those driven by Executive Orders. The posts feature summary statistics and deep dives into key data collections undergoing notable changes.Data Index News covers major developments in the key data collections we monitor. These are sent as-needed when significant news breaks, so they're less frequent but timely when they arrive. You can subscribe to any combination of these — pick what matches your interests and information needs!
